rows.label: qev010101_MSG0001
rows.name:
...This car yours, Onii-san? Heh, it's
your own fault for parking in a place
like this. Especially a BLADE's car...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0002
rows.name:
We finally meet. You're the BLADE
hunters that have been rumored to
be hanging around here, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0003
rows.name:
A bunch of guys who quit BLADE out
of some grievance and formed a gang
to throw their weight around...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I wondered what kind of people you were,
but you're just petty thugs trying to act
tough. ...This is beyond disappointing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wha...?! You bastard! Are you
trying to pick a fight with us?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Not particularly. I have no
interest in small fry like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0007
rows.name:
What I like is a grand, orthodox
story where a great evil is struck
down by an absolute good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hah? Mumbling a bunch of nonsense... Fine...
If you want to die, we'll kill you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0009
rows.name: Heh, go ahead and try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0010
rows.name:
But you know, it's exactly at
times like these that an ally
of justice comes to the rescue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_JNK0010
rows.name: Step Forward

rows.label: qev010101_SEL0011
rows.name: Reveal yourself to the thugs to save Justin.

rows.label: qev010101_JNK0020
rows.name: Observe

rows.label: qev010101_SEL0021
rows.name: Watch the situation unfold for a bit.

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0011
rows.name: ...See?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Tch, you're a BLADE too?! You
called for backup... Damn it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0013
rows.name:
We're leaving, guys! Heh,
you got lucky, Onii-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0014
rows.name: ...Phew.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Stop screwing around! Save the sleep
talking for when you're actually asleep!

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hah! Where exactly is this hero
you're talking about, Onii-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Haha, a hero is someone who
always arrives a little late.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0018
rows.name: ...See?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Tch, you're a BLADE too?! You
called for backup... Damn it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0020
rows.name:
We're leaving, guys! Heh,
you got lucky, Onii-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0022
rows.name: ...Thank you. You really saved me there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0023
rows.name:
I heard some strange guys were hanging
around here, so I came to patrol, but they
picked a fight with me right off the bat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0024
rows.name:
They wrecked my car, too. I was
honestly at a loss for what to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_JNK0030
rows.name: Sympathize

rows.label: qev010101_SEL0031
rows.name: Express sympathy for Justin's misfortune.

rows.label: qev010101_JNK0040
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev010101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Justin about the guys who attacked him.

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0025
rows.name:
So considerate... You really have
the makings of a protagonist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0026
rows.name:
I just love a good morality
tale where a good person like
you strikes down a great evil.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Well... there's not much to tell. I
thought they'd be a bit more decent,
but they were just a bunch of thugs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0028
rows.name:
I thought this whole thing was a waste
of time, but meeting a character like
you made it more than worth it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Ah, sorry for the late introduction.
I'm Justin, a BLADE. Nice to meet you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0030
rows.name:
And you're... [ST:playername ], huh? Hehe, I'm
definitely interested in you now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hey, if you don't mind, could you
fetch some parts for this car for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I can fix it right up if I just have the
parts... Plus, it'll give me time to
prepare all sorts of questions for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I knew you wouldn't say no. Taking
on any unreasonable request, even
with a troubled look on your face...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Because that's exactly the kind of
ally of justice you are, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_JNK0050
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev010101_SEL0051
rows.name: Puff out your chest and agree confidently.

rows.label: qev010101_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010101_SEL0061
rows.name: Shake your head and say you aren't that type.

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0035
rows.name:
Good answer. You can't strike down
evil after evil if you hesitate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0036
rows.name:
I expected that reaction.
Sincere and humble, never
boasting about your own virtues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010101_MSG0037
rows.name:
...Alright, I need you to go and get
me a New-model Anhydrous Radiator.
I'm counting on you, my ideal hero![ST:wait ]
